Title: Suspect Apprehension Certification
Description:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: ~mission(TargetName) 
SYSTEM: Unknown
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: Unknown
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: Upon the recommendation of one our members, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn your Suspect Apprehension Certification.

This would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend wanted suspects who have proven to be more elusive than typical bounties. They often have advanced piloting skills, difficult to predict behavior, and more resources than your average target, making them a real challenge.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend wanted suspect <EM4>~mission(TargetName)</EM4>.


BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.
